title: AOS MCP Server Registry
description: Declares external Model Context Protocol servers whose tools AOS agents may consume. 'MCP on the inside': tools/data only — an MCP server is never an agent and is never a delegation target. Generalizes the hardwired mempalace pattern.

id.description: Globally unique server id, referenced by agent.mcp_servers[] and skill.mcp_binding.server.

transport.description: stdio = spawn a subprocess (like mempalace); http = Streamable HTTP; sse = legacy SSE.

env.description: Extra env for a stdio subprocess. Values may be literal or ${ENV_VAR} references resolved at start.

url.description: http/sse: endpoint URL. Validated by MeshEgressPolicy before connect.

auth_ref.description: Name of an environment variable holding the bearer credential. NEVER the secret itself.

tool_allowlist.description: If set, only these tool names are exposed from this server (narrowing).
